title: HPSC Superintendent Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Haryana Public Service Commission (HPSC) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 4 Superintendent (Legal) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official HPSC website. The last date to submit the application form is 02.06.2026.

age_limit.details: For General Male / Other State Male: Rs. 1000/- For General Female / Other State Female: Rs. 250/- BC-A / BC-B / SC / EWS / ESM Candidates of Haryana: Rs. 250/- PwBD Candidates of Haryana: Nil

qualification.details: B.A L.L.B. Knowledge of Hindi upto Matric Standard; and who has held an assignment involving legal work for a period of not less than ten Years; OR Has practiced at the bar for a period ofnot less than five years

vacancy_details.Post Name: Superintendent (Legal) Group-B in Law and Legislative Department, Haryana

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HPSC Superintendent (Legal) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02.06.2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HPSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HPSC Superintendent (Legal) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the HPSC Superintendent (Legal) recruitment is 02 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Superintendent (Legal) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Superintendent (Legal) post by the Haryana Public Service Commission (HPSC).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the HPSC Superintendent (Legal) recruitment is strictly Online. Candidates must apply through the official HPSC website.

faq.question: Q4. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Superintendent (Legal) recruitment by HPSC is 01/2025.

faq.question: Q5. When did the online application portal re-open?
faq.answer: The online application portal for the HPSC Superintendent (Legal) recruitment re-opened on 19 May 2026, following a corrigendum.

faq.question: Q6. What is the cut-off date for determining eligibility?
faq.answer: The cut-off date for determining eligibility for the HPSC Superintendent (Legal) posts is 02 June 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee mentioned for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the provided data, no specific application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Superintendent (Legal) position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Superintendent (Legal) position is Full Time, indicating a regular employment opportunity.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the HPSC office located?
faq.answer: The HPSC office is located in Panchkula, Haryana. This is the administrative location for the commission's operations.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of HPSC?
faq.answer: The official website of Haryana Public Service Commission (HPSC) is the primary source for all recruitment-related information and application submissions.
